questionHtml:
Which element is found in the 4th group, 6th period of the periodic table?

A. Selenium

B. Lead

C. Chromium

D. Hafnium

meta.title: Which element is found in the 4th group, 6th period of the periodic table? A. Selenium B. Lead C. Chromium D. Hafnium
